amendment_policy: Changing research questions, denominator, expected labels, negative controls, metrics, baseline applicability, ablation map, or stopping conditions requires a recorded protocol amendment before execution.
baseline_contract_closure: A022 normalizes external-baseline wrapper statuses, A032 records the full fixture-level execution of available public-package comparator analyzers, and the release excludes node_modules and package caches while preserving package/version/provenance locks.
baseline_policy: External baselines are wrapped without modifying their internal logic. Unavailable or unsupported status is recorded and not replaced by project logic.
bep_max_validation: A010 BEP-Max adversarial validation keeps the locked BEP-Deep denominator unchanged and checks 4306 generated cases, 418 contrastive repair pairs, 418 local repair frontiers, certificate/repair edges in the exposure graph, and complete validation ladders for all 25 issue classes; it is a validation burden, not a relabeling or prevalence expansion.
bibliographic_metadata_hygiene: A017 upgrades published-version metadata for cited work with published DOI records and adds a BibTeX class/venue/DOI audit without adding or removing citations.
claim_boundary: Deterministic source-grounded fixture experiment; no live-web prevalence, no human-subjects inference, no complete browser-conformance claim.
cross_policy_contract_closure: A021 corrects COEP/CORS resource opt-in to require explicit cors-mode authorization and adds 7 cross-policy contracts over 111 finite states without changing the locked denominator or results.
release_validation_layers: 111 deterministic validation layers, including typed BEP-IR schema closure, semantic-lattice proofs, BEP-SpecBench 4,180-case source-derived boundary and representation-stress validation, metamorphic relations, independent certificate rechecking, generated oracle tests, evidence graph closure, anti-overfit leakage auditing, BEP-Shadow generalization, BEP-Scale stress replay, external provenance/cache exclusion, LaTeX figure-layout audit, strict smoke execution, full public-package external-comparator execution, finite theorem checking, semantic mutation farms, and PDF/release integrity audits.
latex_source_integrity: A012 adds a source-level LaTeX integrity check: exactly one approved IEEEtran documentclass, exactly one end-of-document marker, no active prose after that marker, and no paper-source traces of internal process artifacts. It changes only source hygiene and paper presentation, not labels or results.
pdf_source_compile_closure: A018 adds an isolated LaTeX/BibTeX source-compile audit for main and supplement page counts, reference-page boundary, undefined references, and overfull boxes without retaining build artifacts; A019 hardens the release-validation orchestration so the summary gate is memory-stable in constrained review environments and the source-compile audit selects only a probe-validated BibTeX executable.
post_lock_amendment: A099_REPOSITORY_UPLOAD_PACKET applied after earlier release; no locked research object changed.
protocol_amendment_integrity_closure: A016 is paired with an amendment-integrity gate that requires amendments A001-A099 to be contiguous, parseable, closed, and aligned with release validation gates.
release_language_integrity_closure: A016 adds a release-language integrity gate that rejects provisional pre-lock/candidate wording in release-facing source/resource metadata and removes obsolete plan files without changing locked scientific results.
repository_infrastructure_closure: A024 adds the BEPGuard support package, typed BEP-IR schema audit, deterministic generated oracle tests, environment metadata, and repository-quality audit without changing the locked denominator or results.
reproduction_ladder_closure: A023 adds a deterministic inspection-facing reproduction ladder over local closure gates; A024-A099 extend it to 101 commands covering the BEPGuard semantic-kernel infrastructure, source-derived boundary benchmark, metamorphic/property checks, independent certificate recheck, evidence-graph closure, anti-overfitting leakage checks, shadow generalization, scale-stress replay, external provenance/cache exclusion, figure-layout audit, strict smoke execution, generated tests, and repository-quality audit.
semantic_recomputation_closure: A015 adds an end-to-end semantic recomputation gate: the release validation reruns the BEP-Deep operational oracle, independent decision-table oracle, finite-state cross-checks, and BEP-Max dual-oracle/hash/source/label checks from released inputs without changing labels or denominator.
shadow_scale_closure: A036 and A039 add shadow generalization, anti-overfit, evidence-redundancy, and scale-stress audits outside the locked denominator.
specbench_property_closure: A025 adds BEP-SpecBench, semantic-lattice proof obligations, metamorphic relation checks, independent certificate rechecking, and external benchmark adapter contracts as validation burden outside the locked denominator; A034/A037 and later stress-expansion amendments extend SpecBench stress coverage to 4,180 cases without moving BEP-Deep labels.
theory_mutation_closure: A033/A037 expand the finite theorem kernel to 30 theorems over 33,513 states and the obligation-level mutation farm to 600 killed mutants, with no denominator, label, baseline-scope, or RQ movement.
validation_report_closure: A014 checks that release-level coding-validation reports, auxiliary source ledgers, and lineage result scope markers are synchronized with the release admitted-source and BEP-Deep validation state.
